name: Cursor Agent
description: Headless coding agent via the cursor-agent CLI. Distinct from the cursor IDE launcher binary — requires separate installation. Runs non-interactively with NDJSON streaming output, similar to claude --print.

discovery.note: Do NOT confuse with the `cursor` IDE launcher. `cursor --headless` does not exist. The agent CLI is a separate binary.

auth.mechanism: Cursor Pro subscription required. Auth is derived from the active IDE session token stored in ~/.cursor/ — no separate key needed if the IDE has been signed in.

session.note: cursor-agent is stateless by design. Each mission starts with a fresh context. Use --workspace to anchor tool calls to the repo directory.

execution_flags.todo: Validate all flags against `cursor-agent --help` once installed

event_types.tool_use: tool invocation (filtered out, not surfaced as chat)

cascade_position: manual selection only — not part of the default hermes→claude→openclaw fallback chain
status: implemented — pending flag validation against cursor-agent --help

profile_binding.harness_ref_semantics: 'default' uses the cursor-agent IDE workspace context. 'managed:<name>' injects identity from ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/identity.md via --system-prompt (if supported) or prepended to prompt.

identity_mode.native: Edit .cursor/rules/*.mdc in the active repo workspace, or user rules in ~/.cursor/settings/
identity_mode.managed: Read/write ~/.repociv/profiles/<name>/identity.md; inject via prompt prepend on dispatch

profile_binding.dispatch_injection: Prepend identity content to the prompt passed to cursor-agent
profile_binding.harness_options_note: No native profile list. Managed profiles are dirs under ~/.repociv/profiles/ with harness=cursor
